scene_title: Filhos de Deus e filhas dos homens
narrative_beat: Pintura renascentista de figuras angelicais aladas inclinando-se sobre figuras humanas femininas

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a Renaissance-style fresco rendering of tall winged angelic figures with great gold wings bending down toward female human figures in white robes in the foreground
subject.focal_point: the central angel's face veiled in warm gold shadow leaning down
subject.secondary: Figures rendered in classical fresco style. Antediluvian landscape fades to monochrome behind.
props: winged angelic figures with gold feathers
female human figures in white robes

composition.foreground: angels and humans in rich gold-crimson tones

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, Renaissance fresco texture, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: forbidden union between angelic and human

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
